context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 features verified. Emerald run at /nuzlocke/{id} has encounters for Bulbasaur (GRASS+POISON), Charmander (FIRE), Treecko (FAINTED). Library at /library shows empty state since no ROMs in localStorage. PokeAPI sprites load correctly via pokeapi.co CDN (images visible in party cards).
